itemListElement.reviewBody:
(some) 11 and 12 grade teachers are just power tripping individuals who think no other educator is better than them .They openly scorn at students who attend tuition and yet fail to provide education equivalent to a pathshala.  They will do anything do abuse their power in front of their students, and to them, making the students afraid of them is more important than actually teaching. They mess with children's future as if it's a game.
The first two names that pop into my head are Milton Saha and Samrat Mukerjee although there are several more like them.

The exam system is completely broken to the point where there is an exam every month. Not only does this put unnecessary pressure on students but also hinders their ability to actually understand the materials in depth.

Also, not to mention the ludicrous amount of money they charge.

Although, I must mention that some teachers are extremely cooperative and understanding of the students but a few bad apples are good enough to ruin the reputation of the school.

PS :- I am a science student so I cannot attest to how commerce or humanities students are treated, but I imagine it would be the same, but just to a lesser extent.

The school buses should be air conditioned first of all as they charge transportation fees equivalent to AC Buses in metro cities. Secondly, the space of the school is comparatively less and since huge children are there, there are deafening sound during the break time. Thirdly due to congested space where the school is located, pick up and drop is a hassle. The Academics is good, thats a big solace. The Management should consider shifting to a bigger campus (like South Point is doing) and upgrade their school buses for some routes.
A school that simply looks at your finance and sets the admission. Has 26 sections in 11 and 12 with rubbish students. Teachers are not  upto the mark.

Hi All,
Pls don't do any admission of your child in this school.
Reason huge admission fees and regular fees even for nursery child.
And if due to some uncertainty if you withdraw your admission of child then you will not get refund of admission fees.
I have done admission of my child in nursery and due to some personal issue I have to withdraw the admission and my full.admission fees of Rs 80000 DPS has deducted.
Just understand how a normal middleman will bear all these cost.
Is the big amount for the school why they have such practice of deducting admission fees.

Dont get confused with their brand name. If you are a Non- DPS student taking admission in any class, please dont even think of trying there. They hardly take any Non-DPS student. Only follows some quota systems, preferred transferred persons and the students come from other states.Although they wont say you, rather will take 3000/- in the name of registration, and then will conduct an entrance test, followed by parents interaction on the same day.  All for you to know in a couple of days " Sorry none of the Non-DPS candidates have been selected. Its a joke. So please dont fall in their trap. Never get connected with them easily. Have to call thousand times after they will answer your query if they feel pity. No proper communication with parents and no discipline.
